overview: Azorius Tempo in Legacy leverages card advantage and disruption to control the pace of the game without committing to a full control or combo strategy. By cycling through Ponder and Brainstorm, you maintain a consistent hand size while searching for answers to opponent threats. Flow State provides the necessary acceleration to outpace aggressive decks and close out games before opponents can stabilize.
win_conditions: Outdrawing opponents through consistent card advantage from Ponder and Brainstorm
Using Flow State to generate temporary power spikes and lethal damage
Maintaining board presence while disrupting opponent turns until they run out of resources

keep_criteria: Hands with two to three lands and at least one cantrip
Hands containing early disruption or a playable threat
Hands that allow you to Ponder or Brainstorm on turn one
Keep hands with 2-3 playable lands (preferably duals or fetchable), at least one cantrip (Ponder/Brainstorm), and early interaction (Spell Pierce/Thoughtseize).
Keep Flow State only if paired with a land drop and a cantrip to set up.
mulligan_criteria: Hands with zero or four+ lands
Hands lacking any interaction or card selection
Hands that cannot play a turn-one land or cantrip
Mulligan on 3+ lands with no plays, 1 land with no cantrips/interaction, or hands lacking any way to interact with the opponent's early game.

early_game: Prioritize playing lands and resolving Ponder or Brainstorm to fix your hand
Play early threats if available to force opponent responses
Hold interaction for opponent's key plays while maintaining a full hand
Turn 1: Play a land, cast Ponder or Brainstorm to dig for answers or Flow State setup.
If holding interaction, hold up Spell Pierce or Thoughtseize.
Turn 2: Resolve cantrip, play second land, and either apply early pressure with a cheap threat, hold up interaction for opponent's play, or begin casting Flow State if mana allows.
Prioritize maintaining card advantage over board presence.
mid_game: Cast Flow State to gain tempo and accelerate your resource curve
Trade efficiently, using card advantage to outvalue opponent's board state
Apply consistent pressure to prevent opponents from setting up their win conditions
Preserve mana for interaction until the opponent commits.
Use Ponder/Brainstorm to dig for answers or Flow State rather than overcommitting to the board.
Manage graveyard by avoiding unnecessary scry/dig if opponent has graveyard hate.
Hold back threats if opponent has sweepers or uncounterable answers.
Use interaction to protect your Flow State or key threats, and only commit to board when you have card advantage or opponent is out of interaction.
late_game: Lean into card advantage to draw into finishing threats
Use Flow State repeatedly if possible to maintain board control
Grind out the game by disrupting late-game plans and closing out with efficient threats
Flow State (casting multiple free spells to clear the board, disrupt, or win), resolved threats, or card advantage advantage.
Set up Flow State by ensuring you have multiple cheap spells in hand and enough mana to cast it.
Go all-in when you have card advantage, opponent is out of interaction, or you can safely cast Flow State to swing the board.
Also commit when you can close the game before opponent can stabilize.

key_cards.name: Flow State
key_cards.notes: Cast on opponent's turn or when you have a threat ready to play next turn to maximize the temporary power boost and card draw.

key_cards.name: Ponder
key_cards.notes: Use to find lands, answers, or threats while keeping the top card if it is favorable; cycle it when you need to dig deeper.

key_cards.name: Brainstorm
key_cards.notes: Play to draw three cards and discard one, prioritizing keeping threats or answers while discarding low-value cards or lands if necessary.

sequencing_tips: Always Ponder before Brainstorm if you need a specific answer, as Ponder offers more control over the top card.
Hold Flow State until you have a clear follow-up play to avoid giving the opponent a free turn with a larger hand.
Use Brainstorm to dig for lands when behind on mana, but keep threats in hand to apply pressure.
Prioritize playing lands before cantrips to ensure you have the mana to cast answers on the opponent's turn.
Flow State is a sorcery, so timing is critical—cast it when you can safely resolve it or when you have enough cheap spells to make it impactful.
Ponder and Brainstorm are essential for consistency
never skip them unless you're on the draw and need to stabilize.
Avoid overcommitting to the board, as Azorius Tempo wins through resource advantage and interaction, not board presence.
Watch for format-specific hate cards and adjust sequencing accordingly.

matchups.advice: Use Flow State to outpace their early damage and find answers through Ponder. Prioritize playing lands and holding interaction for their key threats.
watch_for: Pressure that forces you to play suboptimally

matchups.advice: Apply early pressure to prevent them from setting up a locked board. Use Brainstorm to find removal and Flow State to accelerate past their sweepers.
Disrupt their key pieces early with interaction found via Ponder. Use Flow State to generate tempo and close the game before they assemble their combo.
Use Ponder/Brainstorm to dig around counterspells. Cast Flow State to cast multiple spells, forcing opponent to counter the wrong ones. Use discard to remove counterspells from hand.
Apply early pressure and discard to disrupt mana development. Use Flow State to cast cheap removal or counters. Stabilize with sweepers if ramp establishes a board.
Win the resource war. Use discard to remove key cards, out-draw with Ponder/Brainstorm, and use counters to protect your Flow State or threats. Prioritize card advantage and efficient trades.

common_threats: Watch for Tron's land drops (signaling a massive turn), Sneak & Show's creature package, Delver's flip condition, and Ocelot Pride's midrange threats.
Note when opponents hold up mana for counterspells or sweepers, and adjust your sequencing accordingly.

overview_evidence.evidence_span: Archetype: Azorius Tempo, Format: legacy, Signature cards: Flow State, Ponder, Brainstorm

win_conditions_evidence.evidence_span: Signature cards: Flow State, Ponder, Brainstorm

sequencing_tips_evidence.evidence_span: Signature cards: Flow State, Ponder, Brainstorm
